commit_scope: Add a Form-only authority gate for the local form-llama fine-tune so it cannot be treated as the repo's concept/spec/form reasoning authority until held-out local lanes prove it reaches the champion.

commands: form-cli ask "What does the body already know about local form-llama fine-tune authority and on-device reasoning?"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/form-lower.fk form-stdlib/form-macho.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-macho-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/form-pe-coff.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-pe-coff-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-pe-coff-arm64-band.fk
fourth_arm_outputs: form-llama-champion-lane-band: validate.sh returned 255 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent -- kernels agree on every sample.'
local_validation.notes: The prompt guide and wellness passed before this work with existing non-blocking drift already recorded by the body. form-cli ask exited without a grounded body answer in this session, so the implementation is reported as rented-mind authored and body-validated rather than native-generated. The focused proof uses the existing repository validator as development evidence only; the accepted runtime authority is Form-native model cells, inference, training, and Form->asm bytes, with no Python, shell, Go/Rust service, or clang fast path.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after push/PR. Local proof covers the focused Form authority gate and fourth-arm agreement.

deploy_validation.notes: This branch changes Form stdlib and substrate documentation only. Public deployment proof is pending PR merge and normal repository CI/deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local Form proof passed; PR CI, merge, and any public deployment settlement remain pending.

evidence_refs: form-llama-champion-lane.fk defines the six required authority lanes: form-syntax, substrate-concepts, spec-lookup, route-reasoning, multimodal-witness, and form-first-routing.
Each lane row must be source-backed, local-device capable, and held out above the minimum before promotion is possible.
flc-promote? composes the lane readiness gate with champion-challenger cc-promote? so local fine-tune improvement alone is not authority.
flc-native-runtime? accepts only the runtime row form-llama + content-addressed-model-cells + form-native-inference + form-native-training + form-asm-bytes.

tests/form-llama-champion-lane-band.fk proves all lanes present, missing-lane refusal, weak multimodal refusal, reached-challenger promotion, too-few-samples refusal, stable authority labels, and native-runtime row acceptance.
form/fourth-arm-bands.txt registers form-llama-champion-lane with expected verdict 255.
docs/coherence-substrate/form-native-models.form and docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md record the no Python, no shell, no Go/Rust service, no clang runtime boundary.

docs/system_audit/form_llama_on_device_validation_2026-06-23.json records the current local validation: form-llama ran on device through Ollama/MLX with OLLAMA_NO_CLOUD=1 and 100% GPU residency, but raw repo recall failed 0/3 while context-supplied answering passed.
scripts/eval_form_knowledge.py now includes the three failed raw recall probes in deterministic scoring.
Local corpus repair seed added three paraphrased training rows and three exact validation rows to ~/.coherence-network/form-knowledge-corpus/full/{train,valid}.jsonl; both files pass jq empty.

docs/system_audit/form_native_execution_validation_2026-06-23.json records the platform execution validation: Mac Form->Mach-O physical execution passed, Android Form->ELF .so dlopen physical execution passed on device R5CW20DK17A, and Windows PE/COFF object floors passed four-way while physical Windows runtime remains pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The local form-llama fine-tune now has a Form-native promotion policy that refuses authority until local held-out text, substrate, route, multimodal, and form-first routing lanes prove the challenger reaches the champion.
public_endpoints: none added; local Form stdlib and substrate documentation only
test_flows: ready-lane flow: all six lanes present and held out returns readiness.
missing-lane flow: absent multimodal witness refuses readiness.
weak-lane flow: multimodal witness with zero heldout refuses readiness.
competition flow: ready lanes plus reached champion-challenger trials promote the challenger.
sample-floor flow: too few scored trials keeps the champion.
runtime-boundary flow: only content-addressed model cells, Form-native inference, Form-native training, and Form->asm bytes satisfy runtime authority.

fine_tune_repair_seed.notes: This does not claim the model is improved yet. It gives the next local fine-tune and eval the exact failure surface observed on device.
